description.content: Browse, search, recommend, and chart 7digital releases (albums, singles, EPs).
List releases by release date window. Supports paging and territory filters.

query.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the sales territory.

response.name: A paged list of releases.

description.content: List 7digital editorial features, banners, and curated content slots.
List 7digital editorial features, banners and curated slots for a territory.

query.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the sales territory.

response.name: A list of editorial items.

description.content: Resolve catalogue entities (artist, release) from 7digital web URLs.
Resolve a 7digital artist id from a 7digital web URL.
Resolve a 7digital release id from a 7digital web URL.
Payment metadata — supported card types and voucher details.
List the payment card types supported by 7digital.
Look up details for a voucher code (validity, value, redemption status).

The classic 7digital REST API (v1.2) provides access to the 7digital music catalogue (artists, releases, tracks, tags), user lockers, basket/checkout, payment, editorial, territories and IP-lookup. All operations are signed with OAuth 1.0 and scoped by a consumer key issued under a commercial agreement.
